name: Fold_2_Acc

array_types.name: Acc_Array
array_types.code:
type Acc_Array is array (Index_1 range <>, Index_2 range <>)
  of Element_Out;

subprograms.code: function Fold (A : Array_Type; Init : Element_Out) return Acc_Array

procedure Prove_Ind_Col

documentation.description: Axiom: Ind_Prop should be preserved when going to next column

subprograms.name: Prove_Ind_Row

documentation.description: Axiom: Ind_Prop should be preserved when going to next row

Axiom: Final_Prop should be provable at the last iteration from
Ind_Prop.
